AboutPage.title: About AntarX
AboutPage.story: AntarX started with a simple mission: to bring the power of nature to every workout and every workday. We believe in juice that makes a difference.
AboutPage.mission: To provide the purest, strongest juice in Egypt, supporting local farmers and healthy lifestyles.
